content:
A 60ish second overview of the Caro Awakener Sorel.
https://youtube.com/shorts/AvDvbYrHAV8?si=PVb-JM8VCIr0pk6G

embeds.title: Morimens: Sorel Overview #morimens #animehorrorgame #lovecraftianho...
embeds.description:
"Even if her character is condemned by the world and her hands bleed from the cuts of the crown, she will never relinquish the power she has embraced. After all, this is the true nourishment that allows the rose to bloom."

A series that provides a 60 second overview of the Awakeners in Morimens!
An
